mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_addr ( mem_idx, mem_zipcode, mem_addr, mem_addr_detail, is_primary ) VALUES ( #{memIdx}, #{memZipcode}, #{memAddr}, #{memAddrDetail}, #{isPrimary} )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, m.mem_tel FROM member_addr a JOIN member m ON a.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE a.mem_idx = #{memIdx}
ORDER BY a.is_primary DESC, a.addr_idx DESC
SELECT a.*, m.mem_tel FROM member_addr a JOIN member m ON a.mem_idx = m.mem_idx WHERE a.mem_idx = #{memIdx} AND a.is_primary = 'Y' LIMIT 1
